description: store copies char-by-char into the 5-cell memory with no bounds check; return_address reads the last slot; is_safe returns len(text) <= 4.
Sees that input longer than 4 overwrites the return address (kitten/evilX corrupt slot 4), and that is_safe is the check that prevents it.
return_address reuses store rather than re-copying; clear names; a return on every path.
